# Catenda Help Center

> Documentation for Catenda — the open BIM collaboration platform for the construction industry.

## Getting started

Read this section if you get invited to Catenda or sign up for the first time.

- [Step 1 - Account setup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/9030303-step-1-account-setup.md): Create your account and get invited to a project
- [Step 2 - Interface](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/10576075-step-2-interface.md): Navigate to the main areas of your project environment
- [Step 3 - Documents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/10576100-step-3-documents.md): Up- and download, view and communicate about project documents
- [Step 4 - Models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/10576177-step-4-models.md): Navigate through federated models where you can view and select objects
- [Step 5 - Topics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/10576182-step-5-topics.md): Communicate on project interests across authoring tools with BIM
- [Step 6 - Plugins and Integrations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/10576187-step-6-plugins-and-integrations.md): Connect Catenda to your favorite tool

## Account management

Get an overview of your projects or configure your account or organization

- [Accepting an invitation to join a project](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/4670246-accepting-an-invitation-to-join-a-project.md)

## Product Features

The basic features of Catenda Hub. Look here if you are looking for help for a specific feature.

- [2D / 3D - Catenda Site](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/7734138-2d-3d-catenda-site.md)
- [2D and 3D Viewpoints](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/9184555-2d-and-3d-viewpoints.md)
- [2D Viewer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/4854537-2d-viewer.md): Describes the different tools in the 2D toolbar
- [2D viewer - Catenda Site](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/7748370-2d-viewer-catenda-site.md)
- [2D viewer appearance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/13615984-2d-viewer-appearance.md)
- [2D viewer buildings and storeys](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/10901703-2d-viewer-buildings-and-storeys.md)
- [3D Snapshots](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/10345863-3d-snapshots.md)
- [3D viewer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/8227211-3d-viewer.md)
- [3D viewer - Catenda Site](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/7744403-3d-viewer-catenda-site.md)

## Use Cases

Some typical Use Cases from the Industry, and how Catenda Hub can support your projects.

- [Design Review and Change Orders in a High-Rise Construction Project](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/12323690-design-review-and-change-orders-in-a-high-rise-construction-project.md): Industry: Commercial Construction
Persona: Maria, a Project Architect at a large firm.
- [Digital Design Coordination and Issue Resolution for a Hospital Project](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/12320207-digital-design-coordination-and-issue-resolution-for-a-hospital-project.md): Industry: Healthcare Construction / BIM (Building Information Modeling)
Persona: David, a BIM Coordinator for a large general contractor.
- [Document Review in Approval Workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/12628468-document-review-in-approval-workflow.md)
- [Final Approval Decisions Made Easy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/12629484-final-approval-decisions-made-easy.md)
- [Managing Approvals as Administrator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/12620829-managing-approvals-as-administrator.md)
- [Managing Clash Coordination at Scale](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/13845605-managing-clash-coordination-at-scale.md)
- [Submit & Manage Approvals: Guide for Drafters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/12627979-submit-manage-approvals-guide-for-drafters.md)
- [Weekly Clash Reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/13847707-weekly-clash-reports.md)

This article is targeting customers and integration partners using the Catenda API.

- [Bimsync is now Catenda Hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catenda/help-center/main/markdown/en/articles/7890769-bimsync-is-now-catenda-hub.md): Catenda Hub is now named Bimsync
